title: NotNay's Default
description: A 1.8.9 Pack made around the vanilla texture to add simple Quality of Life changes
body:
NotNay's Default is a texture pack made for 1.8.9 PVP gamemodes such as bedwars & skywars.


It was made specifically to celebrate Nayxo's Channel for reaching 350 subs !


It's main goal is just to add onto what gives the Vanilla experience while still improving it.


It also includes a fully custom sky and edited main items for these PVP gamemodes.


/!\ The Sky ONLY WORKS WITH Optifine, while you can use the pack without optifine, the sky as well as the soundpack wont work without it /!\


Here are some screenshots taken with the pack :

![NotNay's Default #1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/85dc29353744776750cb277dbdb9ac558807c426.jpeg)

![NotNay's Default #2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6a88ee029e1930398c62d3af58ebc17177ae6fb3.jpeg)

![NotNay's Default #3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5d94734f16b7d7bd59450a59a93e5f7f5bbd241c.jpeg)


Sidenote : Feel free to join the discord if there is any issues with the Texture pack (Rendering Issues, Crashes, Textures not working properly, Sky glitches and/or not rendering...) It helps us greatly improve the work we do and provide the best for you all !
